raw_consumer_statement: My credit card account was overpaid, and the surplus amount was supposed to be refunded to me via check. However, the company has been sending the check to the wrong address. I live in XXXX, but they are mistakenly sending it to an address in XXXX, XXXX. I have been raising this concern since last XXXX, but despite my efforts to correct it, they have repeated the same mistake again.
